title: Create: Easier Sheets
description: Introduces the Sturdy Hammer a tool that lets you manually press any valid ingot into a sheet on a Depot without needing kinetic energy.
body:
# Create: Easier Sheets 🔨

### Skip the early-game kinetic setup for getting sheets and have them right away.

## ✨ How it works
Simply place any valid ingot onto a **Depot**, Sneak (Shift) + Right-Click with the Sturdy Hammer, and instantly smash it into a sheet! 

![Sturdy hammer functioning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81130c44a56c6d281d06961df36776e3a284a86.gif)

## 🌟 Key Features
* **100% Dynamic Compatibility:** The mod automatically reads Minecraft's internal recipe manager. If an ingot can be pressed by a Mechanical Press (Iron, Gold, Copper, Brass, or even ingots from other mods), the Sturdy Hammer can smash it!

* **Balanced Crafting:** 
- **Sturdy Hammer:** Requires heavy materials to craft (Anvils, Iron Block, Lightning Rod, Copper), keeping it balanced for the early-to-mid game.
- **Obsidian Mallet:** A cheaper, highly brittle alternative for the very early game (crafted with 3 Sticks and 2 Obsidian). Watch out—it has a default 10% chance to shatter instantly upon use!

![sturdy_hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d9026431a3649a858ae700da94a1504405cc593.png)
![obsidian mallet](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d83344aeb5536e29437260cdcf33ef64d38c503.png)
### JEI and EMI integration.
JEI integration is native, for EMI please consider using: https://modrinth.com/mod/tmrv it adds all jei integrations to EMI.

## 📦 Requirements
* **Minecraft:** 1.21.1
* **Modloader:** NeoForge
* **Dependencies:** [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)

Made in México 

Check out my other mod

https://modrinth.com/mod/no-creative-menu
